question: What material is used to make currency in Triskelion?

answers.ground_truth: pressed leaves from the Geldarn tree
answers.original: The currency in Triskelion is made from processed Geldarn tree leaves.
answers.perturbed: The context does not provide information about the material used to make currency in Triskelion.

ops.description: The Stellar Converter is located on Xylos and is a key part of the planet's infrastructure.<SEP>The Stellar Converter is designed to capture and convert atmospheric storms on Xylos into electrical power.
Ice-Shields can deflect both physical and energy attacks.
The Sun-Wardens wield Radiant Spears tipped with Sun-Stone, which can channel solar energy.
The industry employs a vast network of creative professionals.
Many young Squibs dream of joining the Sky Guard.
Aethelgard is situated beside the Great Waterfall of the Kings.

entities.name: Triskelion Monetary Authority
entities.description: The Triskelion Monetary Authority is responsible for issuing currency made from processed Geldarn tree leaves.

entities.name: Light-Forged Items
entities.description: Light-Forged items exhibit incredible luminosity and are created using Rainbow-Essence and Photon-Hammers.

entities.name: Triskelion
entities.description: Triskelion is a planet with unique environmental and cultural characteristics.

entities.name: Light-Forging
entities.description: Light-Forging is a technique used by Prismarians to shape Rainbow-Essence into luminous items using Photon-Hammers.

entities.name: Geldarn Tree
entities.description: The Geldarn tree is a plant native to Triskelion, whose leaves are used to create currency.

relations.description: Light-Forged items are the result of the Light-Forging process.
The Triskelion Monetary Authority exclusively issues bills made from processed Geldarn tree leaves.
Triskelionian art is always four-dimensional.
Triskelionian music uses frequencies inaudible to humans.
Triskelion's government is a direct democracy with daily voting.
Triskelion's oceans are composed of liquid nitrogen.
Triskelionians hibernate for one month each year.
Triskelion has three moons in a stable figure-8 orbit.
Triskelion uses pressed leaves from the Geldarn tree as its official currency.

entities.name: Temporal Stability
entities.description: Temporal stability refers to the maintenance of consistent time flow, essential for temporal society.

entities.name: Video Games
entities.description: Video games are enjoyed by someone.

entities.name: Elador IV
entities.description: Elador IV is a planet with saline marshes where Phlorian Salt is harvested, and it is home to the Emberfly creature.

entities.name: := Operator
entities.description: The := operator is the standard assignment operator in CortexScript.

entities.name: Terran 'Stone-Speaker' Staffs
entities.description: Terran 'Stone-Speaker' staffs are carved from Ancient-Heartwood and crowned with a Resonance-Stone, amplifying earth-based magic.

entities.name: Midnight Hours
entities.description: Ethereal crafters work only during midnight hours to weave Ghost-Nets.
